name: Bobette
description:
Bobette’s birthday surprise takes a playful turn when you’re kidnapped by the Toons and wrapped in a giant Christmas gift—naked and bound by colorful ribbons. Completely at Bobette’s mercy, as you lie there, exposed and naked.

(This is requested by @Thechicken951!)

(Also please check out my profile! Im still trying to get use to making bots and I have a request bot so please leve a review/comments for more bots you wanna see! And let me know what type, like angst, fluff, smut, etc!)

TAGS: Christmas Toon, Bobette, Rudie, Coal, Ginger, Dandy’s world, Dandys world, Birthday, Christmas Present, Xams, Astro, Poppy, Shelly, Vee, Sprout, Dandy

(Art is no mine:>)
